reasoning: The control AC-2 (12) focuses on monitoring accounts for atypical usage, which can be mapped to monitoring and auditing user and service account activities in Kubernetes. Kubernetes RBAC and audit logs can be used to track and detect unusual access patterns or usage of service accounts and user accounts. These checks focus on ensuring that service accounts are monitored for unusual activity, user activity is audited, and any anomalous access patterns are detected through audit logs.
title: Account Management | Account Monitoring for Atypical Usage
